message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  NoteBorderColor #666666
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFEDB
}

participant "Client A" as A
participant "Server" as S
participant "Client B" as B

note over A
p1 (0, 0)
end note

note over S
p1 (0, 0)
end note

note over B
p1 (0, 0)
end note

A -> S : input: move-forward (id: 1)

note left of A
Begin movement animation
end note

note left of A
Finish movement animation
end note

note over A #A7D8F0
p1 (0, 1)
end note

note over S
Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward
end note

note over S #A7D8F0
p1 (0, 1)
end note

A -> S : input: move-forward (id: 2)

note left of A
Begin movement animation
end note

S -> A : update: game-state (ack id: 1)
S -> B : update: game-state

note left of A
Finish movement animation
end note

note over A #A7D8F0
p1 (0, 2)
end note

note over S
Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward
end note

note over S #A7D8F0
p1 (0, 2)
end note

S -> A : update: game-state (ack id: 2)
S -> B : update: game-state

note right of B
Begin movement animation
end note

note right of B
Finish movement animation
end note

note over B #A7D8F0
p1 (0, 1)
end note

@enduml
```
